generated_oml:
// Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring the motor shaft current; data is published via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder sensor providing joint angle resolution; data is published via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder sensor providing secondary joint angle; data is published via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

// Data transmitted over MQTT
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

// Derived data
instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ) calculated from motor current"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEngager
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) calculated from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEngager
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration values calculated from angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEngager
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox angular velocity derived from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEngager
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque values from Simulink friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity values from Simulink friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

// Engineering and simulation models
instance SysMLModelMotorGearbox : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block and interaction diagram describing motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionLawCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of Coulomb–Viscous friction law"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionLawStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of Stribeck friction law"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionLawDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of Dahl friction law"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionLawLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of LuGre friction law"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Metamodel for MBSE; enables creation of SysML asset models"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinEvolutionService
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsSimulationDataService
]

instance MQTTEngager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker interfacing live data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, UnifiedDashboardService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinEvolutionService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model conceptual backbone"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web-based dashboard for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnifiedDashboardService
]

// Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing real‑time joint friction identification and continuous model updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionIdentificationInsight, TuningGuidanceInsight, WearToolChangeInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsSimulationDataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service supplying multi‑physics simulation data to CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides MultiPhysicsSimulationDataInsight
]

instance UnifiedDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing unified dashboard visualization of measured vs simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight, TaskPlanningAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating friction‑parameter updates for controller tuning"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateFrictionParametersAction
]

instance TwinEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service orchestrating the four‑step twin evolution methodology"
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinningProcessInsight
]

// Insights
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time joint friction identification based on live sensor data"
]

instance MultiPhysicsSimulationDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Multi‑physics simulation data supplied to the CNC controller"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization of measured vs simulated data"
]

instance TuningGuidanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tuning guidance for the CNC controller based on friction analysis"
]

instance WearToolChangeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of wear or tool changes derived from friction parameters"
]

instance TwinningProcessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Four‑step purpose‑driven twin evolution methodology"
]

// Actions
instance UpdateFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of friction‑parameter updates for controller tuning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TaskPlanningAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Potential task‑planning adjustments based on friction‑derived insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time continuous synchronization at the robot’s native sampling rate (typically several hundred samples per second), with simulation runs performed synchronously to match instantaneous friction estimates"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow comprising: asset description via AAS, engineering model (SysML), simulation component (Simulink), data‑linking mechanism, processing component generating computed traces, and a visual dashboard—consolidated through MQTT and AAS interfaces"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated phase twin providing online friction identification; engineering stages include design of the digital shadow, implementation of models and data, deployment to the control environment, and operational use"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of every data point to its source and processing chain; comparison of simulated vs. measured data; use of white‑box and black‑box models combined for higher fidelity; continuous model updating to reduce deviation; validation through measurement‑derived torque calculations"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT transport protocol for sensor data ingestion; Asset Administration Shell interfaces for structure and metadata; optional REST endpoints for dashboard communication"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML (v1.7), MBSE methodologies (RFLP, SMArDT), Digital Shadow Reference Model, Asset Administration Shells, and compliance with the digital‑shadow concept of one‑way data flow"
]
